_meta.notes: Synthesized PostToolUse stdin for the lead's TaskUpdate(status='completed') on a single-task dispatch (no paired Task B). This is the negative case for defer-Teardown: completed task has empty blocks/addBlocks (or blocks pointing only to different-teammate or non-lifecycle-relevant tasks), so has_same_teammate_continuation returns False and Teardown emits when count==0. Pairs with two_task_continuation_completion_shape.json (P0.2(b)/(c) coverage). Source: synthesized scenario where lead completes a one-shot teammate task with no follow-on; the typical 'last work item' pattern at the end of a workflow. Predicate must NOT defer here — Teardown is correct.
